Our use of cookies

We use necessary cookies to make our site work. We’d also like to set analytics cookies to help us understand how our site is used.

For more information about the cookies we use, see our cookies page.

Cookie settings

To change cookie settings at anytime, see our cookie settings page.

Necessary cookies

We need to use some cookies to provide essential functionality, such as, security and accessibility. These are called necessary cookies. You can disable them by changing your browser preferences, but our site might not function correctly without them.

Planning Application Details

  • Make a new search

We are not accepting comments for this planning application.

General information
Number P214393/L
Current status Determination Made
Decision Approved with Conditions
Appeal decision
Type Listed Building Consent
Location Winterbyre, 4 Townsend Barns Stretton Grandison Ledbury Herefordshire HR8 2TS
Proposal Replace indoor oil-fired boiler with exterior 11.2 kWh air source heat pump. Install 7.5 kWh solar photovoltaic array (20 standard panels) on south-facing roof. Make opening in roof over lounge for black steel flue for wood burning stove. Replace approx., 4 tiles on roof above kitchen with flush vent for cooker hood.
Parish Stretton Grandison
Ward Three Crosses
Easting/Northing 362860 - 243964
Applicant address Winterbyre, 4 Townsend Barns Stretton Grandison Ledbury Herefordshire HR8 2TS
Publicity date Tuesday 14 December 2021
Comments by Wednesday 2 February 2022
Application dates
Date received Wednesday 1 December 2021
Date validated Wednesday 1 December 2021
Consultation start date Tuesday 14 December 2021
Consultation end date Wednesday 2 February 2022
Decision date Tuesday 12 April 2022
Target determination date Friday 15 April 2022
Consultees
Consultee
Organisation name Built and Natural Environment
Address Herefordshire Council Plough Lane Hereford HR4 0LE
Date consulted 14 December 2021  
Consultee
Organisation name Three Crosses
Address 54 Mount Pleasant New Road Bromyard Herefordshire HR7 4AN
Date consulted 14 December 2021  
Consultee
Organisation name Stretton Grandison PC
Address Hadleigh Bishops Frome Worcester WR6 5AP
Date consulted 14 December 2021
